faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How do I connect the glove?
faq.a1: To connect the glove, turn on Bluetooth on your device, then press the power button on the glove for 3 seconds until the LED blinks blue. Select 'SignGlove' from your device's Bluetooth menu.
faq.q2: What if the gesture is not recognized?
faq.a2: Ensure the glove is properly fitted and charged. Try repositioning your hand or recalibrating the glove in settings.
faq.q3: How can I change the language?
faq.a3: Go to the Languages tab in Settings and select your preferred sign language and translation language.
faq.q4: How do I enable or disable voice output?
faq.a4: Voice output can be toggled in the main translator screen by tapping the speaker icon.
